message:
chore(gitignore): add target_*/ and target-codex*/ for agent-named build dirs

Multi-agent builds produce directories like target_mistylark/,
target-codex-foo/, etc. These are ephemeral build artifacts that should
not be tracked. Added both underscore and hyphen glob patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
